title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at CDSL - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at CDSL - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at CDSL are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Allahabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About CDSL:
CDSL is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CDSL!
